notes: Normal rhythm: Monday easy bike + mobility/strength, Tuesday 1min on/off bike + PM run, Wednesday run-first option, Thursday 5×5 bike + PM swim.
Priority order: long run, long ride, Tuesday bike, Wednesday run, Thursday bike, two swims. Friday stays flexible.

Mon.details: Easy aerobic spin + 15–25m mobility/strength. Hips, glutes, calves, hamstrings and core.
Easy technique swim. Relaxed and feel-based.

Tue.details: 15×1m strong / 1m easy after warm-up. Controlled, repeatable, not a race effort.
Easy aerobic run. Keep it conversational; durability, not pace.

Wed.details: Preferred most weeks. Easy run for durability. If tired, swap for an easy 30m swim.

Thu.details: 5×5m medium effort with easy recoveries. Strong but controlled.
Easy to steady swim. Loosen the body after the bike.

Fri.details: Easy recovery spin. Keep it genuinely easy.
Flexible slot: swim 30m, short easy run, or off depending on fatigue and family/work time.

Sat.details: Long aerobic ride. Fuel consistently and keep most of it controlled.
Optional easy brick shuffle. No pace goal; just practise running off the bike.

Sun.details: Key long run for Ironman durability. Easy enough to finish feeling like you could continue.
